spec.description: A powerful Grafana dashboard for monitoring AdGuard Home DNS performance using Prometheus as the data source.

This panel displays the **real-time DNS query block rate per second**, grouped reason why the query was blocked or allowed.

- Based on metric: `adguard_query_client_reason_total`
- Uses Prometheus query:
spec.title: DNS Query Reasons

spec.description:
This panel displays the **average response time of DNS upstream servers**, in milliseconds.

- Based on metric: `adguard_upstream_avg_response_time_seconds`
- Converted to milliseconds by multiplying with 1000:
spec.title: 🌐 Avg Upstream Response Time

spec.description: If exporter crashed or failed to scrape
spec.title: AdGuard Exporter Status

spec.description: How long the exporter scrapes the AdGuard API
spec.title: Exporter Scrape Duration

spec.description: Count how much API scrapes failure
spec.title: Exporter Scrape Errors

spec.description:
This panel displays the **real-time DNS query rate per second**, calculated over the last 1 minute.

- Based on the metric: `adguard_dns_queries_total`
- Uses the Prometheus `rate()` function:
spec.title: ⚡ 📈 Total DNS Query Rate

spec.description: Number of duplicate DNS queries skipped by exporter deduplication.
spec.title: Deduplicated Queries (last 5m)

spec.description: Number of query entries currently stored in exporter deduplication cache.
spec.title: Exporter Cache Size
DNS Traffic Map by ISP Country

spec.description:
This panel shows the **number of DNS queries per second**, grouped by query type (A, AAAA, PTR, etc.).

- Based on the metric: `adguard_query_type_total`
- Uses the Prometheus `rate()` function with a 5-minute range:
spec.title: 🔍 DNS Query Types
Latency Data Monitoring for Upstream DNS
AdGuard Metrics Statistics
